nodes.name: Nauru reed warbler
nodes.summary: Nauru reed warbler（Nauru reed warbler，学名 Acrocephalus (bird) rehsei），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、外来捕食者。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Nauru reed warbler is potentially threatened by introduced predators and habitat loss, and its small range means that it could be vulnerable to chance occurrences, such as tropical cyclones

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Nauru reed warbler is potentially threatened by introduced predators and habitat loss, and its small range means that it could be vulnerable to chance occurrences, such as tropical cyclones
